latin: Gubernator, rebus in peius vergentibus, gemuit: 'pessimam hebdomadem elegi ad bibendum desistendum.' paulo post addidit: 'pessimam hebdomadem elegi ad fumum desistendum.'

questions.prompt: What keeps happening to the pilot?
questions.target: Things keep getting worse and he regrets quitting his vices
choices: Things keep getting worse and he regrets quitting his vices
He loses communication with the tower

questions.target: He repeats the same complaint about different habits
choices: He repeats the same complaint about different habits

translation: The pilot, as things turned for the worse, groaned: 'I picked the worst week to stop drinking.' Shortly after he added: 'I picked the worst week to stop smoking.'
